chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Present: Irshad Ali Shah, J. Agha Faisal, J. CP D 541 of 2017: Mst. Rafia Bano & another vs. Province of Sindh & others. For the Petitioners: Mr. Safdar Ali Ghouri, Advocate. For the Respondents: Mr. Abdul Hamid Bhurgri, Addl. A.G. Dates of hearing: 22.02.2022. Date of announcement: 22.02.2022. JUDGMENT Agha Faisal, J. The petitioners, being contractual employees, seek direct employment in BPS-17. The advertisement, relied by the petitioners themselves, demonstrates that the experience requirement excluded contractual employment. The respondents’ comments demonstrate that in view of the petitioners’ not having qualified, per the very advertisement that they had applied, their services could not be engaged. It is apparent that the petitioners never challenged the terms delineated vide the advertisement and applied thereunder. The manifest disqualification could not lead to a belated grievance / challenge. No vested right has been demonstrated before us to merit consideration of the discretionary writ jurisdiction of this Court, hence, this petition is dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE
